content.content: How much did I spend on shopping today?

<function_thought>
To determine how much was spent on shopping today, I will first retrieve the current date. Then, I will check the order history to find any orders made on this date. This will allow me to calculate the total spending for today.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_current_day()]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

<function_thought>
